title: Prop Drilling Problem
description: Understand the challenge of passing props through many layers.

slides.title: What is Prop Drilling? 🕳️
Problems with Prop Drilling
slides.content:
## Why It's Bad

- **Clutter** – intermediate components receive props they don't care about.
- **Refactoring pain** – if you need to add a prop, you must add it to every component in the chain.
- **Reduces reusability** – components become coupled to the data structure.

Context API solves this by letting you broadcast data to many components without passing through every level.

quizData.question: What is prop drilling?

options.text: Passing props from parent to direct child
Passing props through intermediate components that don't need them
Using too many props in one component

quizData.explanation: Prop drilling is the process of passing data through components that don't need it, just to reach deeper components.
